title: Biological Hazards & Classification
description: Understand how laser radiation interacts with human tissue, IEC 60825 international standards, and biological safety thresholds. Deep dive into ocular and skin hazards, MPE calculations, and protective eyewear selection.
learningObjectives: Understand ocular anatomy and wavelength-specific hazards
Analyze skin hazards and thermal injury thresholds
Use MPE tables for eye and skin exposure calculations
Select appropriate protective eyewear based on optical density requirements
